name: itlingo-grammar-validator
description: Self-contained Langium grammar validator CLI for DSL publication.

scripts.build: esbuild src/validate.mjs --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/validate.mjs --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" && esbuild src/describe.mjs --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/describe.mjs --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
